productDisplayName: Doodle Boy's Route 66 Biker Blue Teen Kidswear
description: CompositionTurquoise blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, sleeveless with white piping around the neckline and sleeves, chest print and print below the neck with flock detailing, embroidery and rubber printFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycleDo not bleachTumble dry low or lay flat to dryWarm iron when neededDo not iron on printImbibe the spirit of Sports in your little man with this t-shirt from doodle. Let him learn the spirit of sports by playing various games with his friends, while doodle takes care of keeping him cool and comfortable. Team this with capris and sneakers for an even more sporty look.
